texto: I didn't pretend to comprehend what he meant. I simply closed my eyes and let his arms wrap around me. The warmth that came from his body made me feel at home, as if, somehow, this is where I belonged. He smelled of woods after a thunderstorm, clean and elemental.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Lucy Swing: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a amor. O trecho “I didn't pretend to comprehend what he meant. I simply closed my eyes and let his arms wrap aroun…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, paranormal, romance pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e termino.
